description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure depicted in a dynamic, acrobatic pose, with the body arched backward and the head tilted up. The figure's arms are extended upward and appear to be holding or suspended from two long, thin supports, suggesting a gymnastic or aerial performance. The clothing is form-fitting and appears to be a single-piece garment, with the legs and arms clearly defined. The feet are pointed downward, and the legs are slightly bent at the knees, emphasizing the sense of movement. The facial features are simplified, and the hair is short and straight, framing the face. The overall form is sleek and smooth, with a glossy finish that reflects light.
description: A stylized adult figure in an acrobatic pose, suspended by raised arms and wearing a form-fitting garment. The figure has a dynamic, arched posture and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, outstretched arms holding supports, and the arched body with pointed feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backward arch of the body and the extended arms gripping the supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, bent legs, and the attachment of the arms to the supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curvature of the body and the dynamic posture.
attribute_posture: arched backward with arms raised and gripping supports
